Traced areas apply automatically — as you draw, they fill the Site Area Budget and the estimator, and update live if you adjust or delete a shape. Use Delete on a card to clear that whole category. Public records fill lot & home automatically.

Notes & Scope Clarifications

Disclaimer: This is a preliminary construction cost estimate prepared by Studio H Landscape Architecture. Actual costs may vary based on final design, material selections, contractor bids, and site conditions. This estimate is not a contract or bid. Final pricing is determined through the contractor bidding process.
Total Estimated Construction Cost
$0
Price Book

The master list of every line item and its cost range. The estimator pulls from here. Edit any low/high unit cost, rename items, change units, or add and remove items. Changes save automatically in this browser and apply across all views.

Plant List Book

The master plant database the estimator pulls from. Edit any value, tag plants into categories, and add your own species — changes save to this browser and feed the planting builder. Sunset/USDA climate zones and WUCOLS water-use are shown for each plant.

Nurseries

Your wholesale sourcing database. View each nursery's full inventory — container sizes, availability, wholesale cost, and your retail price — and edit it all inline. Import a price list to load a nursery, or build one by hand.
